text.value: Refer to page 6 of bango kitita
The woman you are trying to register for pregnancy is above 49 years of age. Are you sure you want to continue?
The woman you are trying to register for pregnancy is below 15 years of age. Are you sure you want to continue?
Afraid of a specific service provided at ANC
Bad previous experience (poor quality of care, treated badly)
Lack of partner support or permission to go
Not enough money for transport or paying for services and supplies
Why have you not attended any ANC visits?
EXPLAIN: It's very important that you attend all four visits because life-threatening complications are often only seen at the third or fourth visit.
Please enter a value between 0 and 8. If you have already done an ANC visit, then enter a value greater than the one entered previously.
How many ANC visits have you attended?

As soon as you are aware you are pregnant, it is important to go to the nearest health facility for antenatal care (ANC). You should go to ANC 4 times throughout your pregnancy as directed by the health worker.

Now we will discuss early signs of labor. Go through each sign with the mother and indicate why it's important to get to the facility as early as possible: • Nesting - sudden spurt of energy • Shivering - Even when not cold • Lightening - This process makes you feel "lighter". Lightening may cause a feeling of pressure on your bladder, leading to more trips to the bathroom • Diarrhea • Lower back ache • Loss of mucus plug - Mucus may be tinged with blood and, for this reason, is often called a "bloody show. • Labor Contractions - Strong and regular contractions (usually about 3-5 minutes apart) are often a sign you are in labor.

Explain the importance of savings for transport to the health facility, other costs associated with her care and delivery, and especially in case of an emergency. For example, you can keep a piggy bank. Or, you can use mobile money. Or, you can join a savings group.
Prepare the person who will stay in the home to take care of other children while you are at the hospital.
Preparing for child care during delivery

It's important to have a plan for how you will get to the health facility to deliver. Explain that you can connect the woman with a driver who can transport her to the health facility quickly once labor begins.
Provide the mother with phone number(s) for taxi drivers and the prices for health facilities.
Name: Age: years Contact person: House number: Kitongoji:

As a CHV, you are responsible for making sure that you are providing the community with health education and services while trying to take precautions to stop the transmission of Corona virus to one another. Therefore, make sure you consider the following while you conduct the visits: • Wash your hands with soap/sanitizer as many time as you can while at home, once you are at the client's house and when you leave. • Keep a 2 meters distance while talking to your clients. • Don't shake hands with your clients. • Avoid group gatherings. • Provide the service at the open space and if it should be inside, make sure the windows and doors are open. • Cover your mouth with a towel or elbow when you sneeze or cough. • Do not go for a visit if you have symptoms of fever, cough or frequent sneezing. • Please remember to do the covid education visit before or after submitting this form.
Precautionary measures when visiting a client
Now I will ask you some questions about pregnancy danger signs. Have you experienced any of these symptoms?
To be answered by the CHV
Fever and being too weak to get out of bed
This woman is experiencing or has experienced an emergency danger sign. Urge the woman and her family to get the woman medical help as the lives of the mother and her baby are potentially in danger.
No emergency referral condition was identified.
OBSERVE: if the client has the following pregnancy danger signs.
If you have nipple or breast problems, see a health worker for care right away.
Do mothers in your community start breastfeeding immediately after birth, even before expelling the placenta? Discuss with the mother.
Put your baby on the breast immediately after birth (within 1 hour), this will help to stimulate your brain and send a signal that you need to produce milk for your baby.
Putting the baby on the breast immediately after birth will help expel the placenta and reduce postpartum bleeding.
Educate the client on the importance of early initiation of breastfeeding immediately after birth. Refer to page number 12 in Bango Kitita.

Feeding the baby sugar water, honey, water, powdered milk, cow's milk, or goat's milk— rather than breastfeeding—may interfere with establishing good breastfeeding practices and could lead to diarrhea, pneumonia, or other illness in the baby
The first yellow milk (colostrum) does two important things • It helps to protect the infant from illness • It helps the infant to expel its first dark stool
What type of floor does have in her house?
To be answered by the CHV
What is the highest level of school you attended?
Do you have electricity in your home?
What type of roof does have in her house?
To be answered by the CHV
Water tap or pump away from home
Piped water (water tap or pump) on own compound
From where do you get your water?
Ask partner: Will you allow to deliver at a health facility? This means you will support her to get transportation and will help her to save money to pay for the transport and other expenses.

It is important for everyone to deliver in a health facility. You can never predict when there will be an emergency. If you do experience an emergency during delivery, you must be at a health facility to get the care you need to save you and your baby's life. If you have had any complications with pregnancy or delivery in the past, it is even more important that you go to a health facility this time for you and your baby's safety.
Where did you deliver you last child?
Encourage mother to continue delivering at local health facility or hospital.

It is important for everyone to deliver in a health facility. You can never predict when there will be an emergency. If you do experience an emergency during delivery, you must be at a health facility to get the care you need to save you and your baby's life. If you have had any complications with pregnancy or delivery in the past, it is even more important that you go to a health facility this time for you and your baby's safety.
Is the client's partner present during this visit?
To be answered by the CHV
Has your partner allowed you to deliver at a health facility and will he support you to get transportation and help you to save money to pay?
Please talk to your partner so that he can facilitate your delivery to health facility.
Cannot select the option "No one available" with other options
Is anyone in your family available now to participate in this visit?
Encourage the woman to invite family members to join at future visits.
You are doing well and you don't need to go to the health facility urgently at this time. I'll return for another checkup when it's time for the next visit.
Recommended to deliver at a higher level facility
To get ANC services since you are 6 months or more into pregnancy
To address emergency pregnancy danger signs
To address other pregnancy danger signs
You need to go to the health facility for the following reasons:
Previous Delivery 10 or more years ago
Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user

Do you know that you and your child are susceptible to malaria? You and your baby are at most risk of malaria. Malaria will continue to be an important danger throughout your child's early years of life. Malaria can cause : • Premature birth – birth before 37 weeks of pregnancy. • Low birth weight. • Restricted growth of the baby in the womb. • Stillbirth. • Miscarriage. • Death of the mother • Anemia
If you sleep under mosquito net you can protect yourself and your child from the above effects
You can get a free mosquito net at the health facility.

All pregnant women are at risk of anemia. It's very important to take iron and folic acid tablets to prevent anemia during pregnancy and for at least 3 months after your baby's birth. ALL pregnant women need to take iron and folic acid, even if they don't have headache.
Were you given tablets to prevent anemia at the health facility?
Please look at page 2 of bango kitita for more information.
I know that sometimes you might feel like eating things like charcoal or soil. Try your best to make sure you avoid eating them, you can harm yourself and the baby.
You should avoid taking tea or coffee with meals because it can prevent the absorption of nutrients, especially iron. This can cause anemia in the long run.

It is important, especially for pregnant woman to eat more vegetables, fruits, and proteins. Use iodized salt to help your baby's brain and body develop well. For example, here are some of the absolute BEST foods that you should increase eating:
• Kula mbogamboga kwa wingi sana mfano: mchicha, mtoriro (matembele), kisambu. • Matunda pia mfano: machungwa, mapapai, embe, na ndizi. • Na pia uongeze vyakula vya protein kidogo mfano: madagaa, samaki, kuku, na mayai.
Please refer to page 2 of bango kitita.
As you may know, nutrition is extremely important for pregnant women. Poor nutrition can have a negative effect on your health, and the health of your baby.
Do you follow any nutrition restrictions while pregnant (for example, not eating eggs)?
Remind the health care provider when you visit the facility next time.
Why did you not receive tablets to prevent anemia?

I would like to discuss about the use of traditional medicine during pregnancy and the effects they have to your health and that of your unborn child. Most women use herbs like Mpambawake, Shajaratul Maryam, Mzalia nyuma,Tangawizi and Henna to induce labor, heal abdominal pain, reduce morning sickness and increase blood during pregnancy. However, if these herbs are used in excess and without doctor's consultation, they can lead to high/low blood pressure, miscarriage, birth of a mentally/physically ill baby and sometimes death to either mom, baby or both.

I would like to ask you a few questions that will help us improve the health services provided in your community in the future. You can decide you do not want to answer a question – just let me know if you prefer not to answer. Can we proceed?
What is the highest level of school your husband/partner has attended?
Please enter an age between 18 and 90
You and your husband/partner (or other family member) jointly
Who usually makes decisions about your health care? [Primary or ultimate decision-maker]
Does your (husband/partner) have other wives or does he live with other women as if married?
Please enter a value between 1 and 10.
Including you, in total, how many wives or live-in partners does your partner have?
Are you living together with your husband?
How do you typically travel from your home to the healthcare facility for routine/non-emergency visits?
Typically, how long does it take for you to travel from your home to the nearest healthcare facility for a routine/non-emergency visit?
Are you comfortable to disclose your HIV status?
I understand. If you'd like, we can discuss this further at my next visit.
Remind client of the importance of safe sex practices, and ensuring both she and her partner are tested and know their status so they can protect themselves and their unborn child.

Discuss importance of knowing her HIV status to be able to protect herself and her unborn child and the only way she can do this is through knowing her status by going to health facility to get HIV test
Have you been tested for HIV during this pregnancy?

As you visit the health facility there are some women called Mother Mentor who can help you/guide through on how you can take care of your self during pregnancy and after delivery so that you can give birth safely and to a healthy HIV free baby. Please ask the medical worker in order to connect you and give you more information on this. This are HIV positive women who managed to follow and complete PMTCT care cascade and they gave birth to healthy and free HIV baby, they will help throughout your journey so that you can also give birth to a free HIV baby.
Encourage client to go to nearest ART clinic.

Part of my job as a CHV is to help pregnant women like you and make sure you and your unborn baby are health during this period. I will be visiting you during your pregnancy and after you deliver your baby. Do you consent to receiving pregnancy CHV services?
Great! We can start the first pregnancy visit now.
OK, I understand that you don't want services from me now. It's important that you are checked on during your pregnancy so I will come back later and see if you have changed your mind.
Do you feel the baby moving on a daily basis, at least every six hours?

Now you are at the stage of comparing your palm with the client's palm. Before doing this, please keep a 2 meters distance from your client as a precautionary measure to avoid the spread of Corona virus. Please ask your client to show you their palm while still keeping the distance.
I am referring you to a health facility because I have identified that you have danger sign(s)
Based on our conversation, I did not identify any health issues, but if you develop any of the signs we discussed today, you should go to a health facility immediately
Does the client have pallor? Compare your palm with client's palm. If client's palms are paler than yours, this is pallor.
Early labor pain before 9 months gestation
Signs of malaria (feeling cold, fever, vomiting)
Swelling of face, arms, fingers, or legs

Continue with the following questions. Indicate if the client has any of the following common pregnancy issues.
Have you experienced:
I am referring you to a health facility because I have identified that you have danger sign(s)
How many stillbirths have you had?
Have you had any of the following during previous deliveries?
Is this the first time you have been pregnant?
How many of the children you delivered are still alive today?
Do you use local herbs to help your pregnancy?

I would like to discuss about the use of traditional medicine during pregnancy and the effects they have to your health and that of your unborn child. Most women use herbs like Mpambawake, Shajaratul Maryam, Mzalia nyuma,Tangawizi and Henna to induce labor, heal abdominal pain, reduce morning sickness and increase blood during pregnancy. However, if these herbs are used in excess and without doctor's consultation, they can lead to high/low blood pressure, miscarriage, birth of a mentally/physically ill baby and sometimes death to either mom, baby or both.
Have you previously delivered by caesarean section?
Have you previously delivered by vacuum?
Count of deliveries should be less than or equal to count of previous pregnancies
How many of these pregnanices ended in miscarriages/abortions?
How many times have you been pregnant in the past?
A stillbirth is the loss of pregnancy over 6 months gestation. Have you ever had a stillbirth?
I would advise you to rest, get a good balanced diet, do not do any heavy work, and try to practice family planning.
Was your last pregnancy 10 or more years ago?

It is important for everyone to deliver in a health facility. You can never predict when there will be an emergency. If you do experience an emergency during delivery, you must be at a health facility to get the care you need to save you and your baby's life. If you have had any complications with pregnancy or delivery in the past, it is even more important that you go to a health facility this time for you and your baby's safety.

There are seven rights of a woman/pregnant woman during delivery period as follows:
• The right not to be harmed psychologically or physically. • The right to be informed, or the decision of having her partner should be respected at the time of delivery, without affecting the treatment or services she is entitled to. • The right to be served honestly and confidentially. • The right to be served with dignity and respect. • The right to freedom and equality without discrimination. • The right to access the best possible services. • The right to freedom, independence, self-determination and non-coercion.
Rigths of a pregnant woman during delivery
Please enter an amount between Tsh. 100 and Tsh. 300,000
How much money did you pay for the services?

I'd like to ask you a few questions about the quality of the services you received last time you went to the health facility. We will anonymously share this information with DHMT or other persons in the MOH so that they can improve the services that are provided. You can choose not to answer any question you don't want to. Is it ok for us to proceed?
Which district is the health facility located?
Where is the health facility located?
No, I didn't get a service
Yes, I got all the services at the faciltiy
Yes, I got some services but also had to go to another place as well for tests/invenstigations/other services.
Did you get the services at the facility you went to ?
I had no money to pay for the services
There was no regeants/tests at the faciltiy
The waiting time was too long. I decided to come back home.
Why did you not get the services?
Would you recommend your sister or relative to attend the same clinic for ANC?
What did you go to the 2nd facility/pharmacy for?
Did you pay for any service?
During your most recent ANC visit, which services did you receive?
ASK or look at RCH card: Have you been told your current pregnancy will be a big baby (more than 4 kg)?
ASK or look at RCH card: Have you been told your current pregnancy is in a breech position?
Before asking for the RCH card, please make sure you wash your hands with soap and please ask your client to wash their hands before handing over the card to you.
Estimated delivery date can be up to 9 months from today
Please enter a value between 1 and 9
At which type of facility were you advised to deliver?

Please try your best to regularly visit the clinic during your pregnany. It is also important for everyone to deliver in a health facility. You can never predict when there will be an emergency. If you do experience an emergency during delivery, you must be at a health facility to get the care you need to save you and your baby's life. If you have had any complications with pregnancy or delivery in the past, it is even more important that you go to a health facility this time for you and your baby's safety.
Has a health worker advised you to deliver at a higher level facility than your local health facility such as a cottage hospital or referral hospital?
Is estimated delivery date written on RCH card?
LMP date can be between today and 44 weeks ago
ASK or look at RCH card: Have you been told your current pregnancy is in malpresentation?

It is important for everyone to deliver in a health facility. You can never predict when there will be an emergency. If you do experience an emergency during delivery, you must be at a health facility to get the care you need to save you and your baby's life. If you have had any complications with pregnancy or delivery in the past, it is even more important that you go to a health facility this time for you and your baby's safety.
Do you have any of the following medical conditions:
ASK or look at RCH card (Box C): Have you been told you are having a multiple pregnancy?
Do you remember your Last menstrual Period (LMP) date?

I would advise you to rest, get a good balanced diet, do not do any heavy work, and try to practice family planning. It is also important for everyone to deliver in a health facility. You can never predict when there will be an emergency. If you do experience an emergency during delivery, you must be at a health facility to get the care you need to save you and your baby's life. If you have had any complications with pregnancy or delivery in the past, it is even more important that you go to a health facility this time for you and your baby's safety.
The pregnancy loss date cannot be in the future
Fill out the delivery form.
See and ask if the mother has had her baby. Has she given birth?
In this visit, I will go over all the important information that you need to know about pregnancy as well as refer you to health facility in case of any danger signs.
Bad previous experience (poor quality of care, treated badly)
Afraid of a specific service provided at ANC
Not enough money for transport or paying for services and supplies
Lack of partner support or permission to go
You and your husband/partner (or other family member) jointly
Yes, I got all the services at the faciltiy
Yes, I got some services but also had to go to another place as well for tests/invenstigations/other services.
No, I didn't get a service
Signs of malaria (feeling cold, fever, vomiting)
Swelling of face, arms, fingers, or legs
Early labor pain before 9 months gestation
There was no regeants/tests at the faciltiy
The waiting time was too long. I decided to come back home.
I had no money to pay for the services
Water tap or pump away from home
Piped water (water tap or pump) on own compound
Angalia katika ukurasa namba 6 kwenye bango kitita
Mwanamke unayetaka kumsajili kama mjamzito ana umri zaidi ya miaka 49, Je Unahijataji kuendelea?
Msichana unayetaka kumsajili kama mjamzito yuko chini ya umri wa miaka 15, Je unahitaji kuendelea?
Anaogopa huduma fulani inayotolewa kwa waja wazito
Nilikosa ushirikiano na mwenza au sikupewa ruhusa ya kwenda
Sikua na pesa za kutosha kulipia usafiri, kulipa gharama za matibabu au kununua vifaa
Ilikua ni mapema sana kwa ujauzito wangu
Ni kwanini haujawahi kuhudhuria hata mara moja klinik ya mama wajawazijto?
ELEZA: Ni muhimu sana kuwa umehudhuria mara zote nne kwasababu hali ya hatari inayoweza kutishia maisha ya mama mjamzito mara nyingi huonekana katika tembeleo la tatu au la nne.
Tafadhali ingiza idadi kati ya 0 na 8. Ikiwa ulienda katika kituo cha afya, tafadhali ingiza idadi isiyopungua idadi ya tembeleo la mwisho.
Je ni mara ngapi umehudhuria klinik ya mama wajawazito?
Huduma ya Vipimo na Ushauri ya awali ya mama wajawazito.

Mara utakapojihisi kwamba ni mjamzito, ni muhimu kwenda kituo cha afya cha karibu kwa ajili ya huduma ya kliniki ya wajawazito (ANC). Unatakiwa kwenda kliniki ya wajawazito mara 4 katika muda wa ujauzito kama uliovyoelekezwa na mhudumu wa afya

Sasa hivi tutajadili dalili za awali za uchungu wa kujifungua. Jadiliana na mama kila dalili na onesha ni kwanini kuna umuhimu wa kuenda kituo cha afya mapema kadiri inavyowezekana. • Kuwa na wasiwasi na mwili kudhoofu. • Kutetemeka hata kama hakuna baridi • Kujiskia kwenda haja ndogo kila mda. • Kuharisha • Kuwa na maumivu makali chini ya kiuno • Kuvunja chupa • Kujiskia uchungu

Eleza umuhimu wa kuweka akiba kwa ajiliya usafiri wa kwenda kituo cha afya, gharama nyengine zinazohusiana na matunzo na kujifungua kwake na zaidi katika kipindi cha dharura. Kwa mfano, unaweza kuweka bank. Au unaweza kutumia huduma za fedha katika simu au unaweza kujiunga na vikundi vya kueka na kukopa.
Andaa mtu ambaye atakaa na watoto nyumbani katika kipindi chote ambacho utakuwa hospitali
Kuandaa mtu wa kukaa na watoto wakati wa kujifungua
Ni muhimu kuandaa mpango wa kuenda kujifungulia kituo cha afya. Eleza kuwa unaweza kumuunganisha mama mjamzito na driver ambaye atakuja kumbeba kumpelekeka kituo cha afya punde akikaribia kujifungua.
Mpe mama namba ya dereva na umueleze gharama za kwenda kituo cha afya.
Tarehe ya mwisho ya tembeleo:
Jina: Umri: miaka Mtu wa karibu kwa mawasiliano: Namba ya nyumba: Kitongoji:

Kama mhudumu wa afya ya jamii, una jukumu la kuhakikisha unatoa elimu ya afya ya jamii na huduma huku ukijikinga ili kuepusha kusambaa kwa maambukizi ya korona kutoka kwa mtu mmoja kwenda kwa mwengine. Hivyo hakikisha unazingatia yafuatayo wakati ukiwa unatoa huduma: • Osha mikono yako kwa maji na sabuni au kutumia vitakasa mikono mara nyingi kadiri unavyoweza ukiwa nyumbani kwako,nyumbani kwa mteja wako na pindi ukimaliza kutoa huduma. • Hakikisha kuna umbali wa mita mbili kati yako na mteja wako unayeenda kumtembelea • Pindi ukiongea na wateja wako , usishikane mikono. • Epuka mikusanyiko. • Toa huduma katika maeneo yaliyo wazi na ikitokea ukafanya ndani hakikisha milango na madirisha yanakuwa wazi. • Funika mdomo wako kwa kitambaa au kiwiko unavyooenda chafya au kukohoa. • Tafadhali usiende kutoa huduma ukijihisi na dalili za homa na kukohoa na kwenda chafya kwa wingi. • Tafadhali kumbuka kufungua fomu ya kuwaelimsiha wanakaya juu ya maambukizi ya korona na jinsi ya kuchukua tahadhari. Tembeleo kuhusu korona unaweza kulifanya kabla ya kuanza tembeleo lako au mara baada ya kumaliza tembeleo lako hili.
Hatua za kuchukua pindi unapoenda kumtembelea mteja wako
Sahivi naomba kukuliza maswali yanayohusiana na dalili za hatari kwa ujauzito. Je una dalizi za hatari kati ya hizi zifuatazo?
Kupumua kwa haraka au ugumu katika kupumua
Mwanamke huyu anadalili za hatari au aliwahi kupata dalili za hatari za ghafla. Mtake Mama na familia yake kupata msaada wa kimatibabu kwasababu maisha ya mama na mtoto wake yapo katika hatari.
Kwa sasa, hauna dalili yoyote ya hatari iliyogundulika. Lakini ukipata dalili yote kati ya hizi tulizozijadili, tafadhali nenda kituo cha afya haraka iwezakanavyo.
ANGALIA: kama mteja ana dalili za hatari kwa wajawazito hizi zifuatazo.
Ukiwa unatatizo la nywato/chuchu au maziwa, muone muuguzi kwa ajili ya matibabu.
Je mama walioko katika jamii yako wanamnyonyesha mtoto punde tu baada ya kujifungua, hata kama wakiwa hawajatolewa kondo la nyuma? Jadiliana na mama.
Mueke mtoto wako kwenye ziwa punde tu baada ya kujifungua (ndani ya saa moja), hii itakusaidia kuamsha akili yako na kuamsha hisia za kutengeneza maziwa mapema kwa ajili ya mtoto wako.
Kumnyonyesha mtoto punde tu baada ya kujifungua inasaidia kutoka kondo la uzazi na kupunguza kutokwa na damu inatoka baada ya kujifunga.
Kuelimisha juu ya umuhimu wa kuanza kumnyonyesha mtoto mara tu baada ya kujifungua. Fungua kadi namba 12 kwenye bango kitita.

Kulisha mtoto vitu vyengine kama vile Maji ya sukari, asali ,maji, au maziwa mengine yasiyokuwa ya mama kwa mfano ( maziwa ya unga, maziwa ya ng'ombe au maziwa ya mbuzi)—inaweza kukwaza uanzilishaji mzuri wa lishe ya mtoto.
Maziwa ya mwanzo(danga) hufanya kazi mbili muhimu. • Yanamlinda mtoto na magonjwa. • Yanamsaidia mtoto mchanga kutoa choo cheusi.
Aina gani za sakafu anazo katika nyumba yake?
Nimesoma zaidi ya sekondari ya Juu (Chuo)
Ni kipi kiwanga chako cha elimu ulichohitimu?
Je unatumia nishati ya umeme nyumbani kwako?
Je ushawahi kujiunga/kusajiliwa kwenye mradi kama huu?
Maji ya bomba mbali na nyumbani
Maji ya bomba ndani ya kiwanja cha nyumbani
Maji ya juu ya ardhi (mto, dimbwi, maji ya mvua)
Je unapata wapi maji salama ya kunywa?
Kiwango cha elimu na usajili uliopita

Ni muhimu kwa kila mtu kujifungua kituo cha afya. Kwasababu huwezi kujua kama unaweza kupatwa na tatizo au dharura yoyote wakati wa kujifungua. Kama umepatwa na tatizo wakati wa kujifungua ni lazima ufike kituo cha afya ili kupata huduma muhimu kwa ajili yako na mtoto ili kuhakikisha usalama wako na mtoto. Kama uliwahi kupata matatizo yoyote kipindi cha nyuma katika ujauzito wako uliopita au wakati wa kujifungua. Pia ni muhimu zaidi kuenda kituo cha afya muda huu ili kuhakikisha usalama wako na mtoto.
Ni wapi umejifungua mtoto wako wa mwisho?
Muhamasishe mama kujifungulia kituo cha afya.

Ni muhimu kwa kila mtu kujifungua kituo cha afya. Kwasababu huwezi kujua kama unaweza kupatwa na tatizo au dharura yoyote wakati wa kujifungua. Kama umepatwa na tatizo wakati wa kujifungua ni lazima ufike kituo cha afya ili kupata huduma muhimu kwa ajili yako na mtoto ili kuhakikisha usalama wako na mtoto. Kama uliwahi kupata matatizo yoyote kipindi cha nyuma katika ujauzito wako uliopita au wakati wa kujifungua. Pia ni muhimu zaidi kuenda kituo cha afya muda huu ili kuhakikisha usalama wako na mtoto.
Tafadhali zungumza na mwenza wako ili akusadie kuweza kujifungua katika kituo cha afya.
Umuhimu wa Kujifungua Kituo cha afya
Je kuna yoyote katika familia yako ambaye anaweza kuja kushiriki katika mazungumzo yetu haya?
Muhamasishe mama awaalike watu wengine walioko kwenye familia washiriki katika tembeleo lako linalofata.
Kujifungua mtoto mkubwa ( zaidi ya kilo 4) (mimba hii au kabla)
Unaaendelea vyema na huhitaji kwenda kituo cha Afya kwa sasa. Utarudi kumkagua tena wakati wa tembeleo jengine.
Kushauriwa kujifungua katika kituo cha afya kikubwa
Hatari za kutumia dawa za mitishamba
Ili kupatiwa huduma za mama mjamzito kwasababu una ujauzito wa miezi 6 au zaidi.
Ili kushughulikia dalili za hatari za dharura za mama mjamzito.
Ili kushughulikia dalili nyengine za hatari.
Unatakiwa uende kituo cha afya kutokana na sababu zifuatazo:
Mwenwa hajatoa ruhusa ya kujifungua kituo cha afya
Mimba iliyopita ilikuwa miaka kumi ilopita au zaidi
Kujifungua kwa kusaidiwa kuvutwa na mashine

Je unajua kuwa wewe na mtoto wako mnaweza kushambuliwa na ugonjwa wa malaria? Wewe na mtoto wako mpo katika hatari zaidi ya kupata malaria. Malaria ni moja kati ya maradhi mabaya sana kwa mtoto wako katika miaka ya mwanzoni, malaria inaweza kusababisha: • Kuzaa mapema kujifungua kabla ya wiki 37 za ujauzito. • Kuzaliwa mtoto aliye na uzito pungufu • Kushindwa kukuwa mtoto akiwa katika tumbo a mama. • Mtoto kufia tumboni • Kuharibika kwa ujauzito • Kufariki kwa mama mjamzito • Upungufu wa damu Ikiwa utalala kwenye chandarua kilicho na viatilifu utajikinga wewe na mtoto wako kutokana na athari hizo zilizotajatwa awali
Unaweza kupata chandarua bure kituo cha afya.
Huduma za vyandarua vilivyo na viatilifu

Mama wajawazito wote wapo katika hatari ya kupata tatizo la upungufu wa damu. Ni muhimu kutumia dawa za iron na folic zinazoengeza wingi wa damu ili kukinga tatizo la upungufu wa damu katika kipindi cha ujauzito na angalau miezi mitatu baada ya kujifungua. Kila mjamzito anapaswa kula dawa za iron na folic, hata kama hawana maumivu ya kichwa.
Je, ulipata vidonge vinavyozidisha waingi wa damu mwilini ulipokwenda katika kituo cha afya?
Tafadhali angalia ukurasa namba 2 katika bango kitita kwa maelezo zaidi.
Najua baadhi ya wakati unajisikia kula vitu kama vile mkaa au udongo. Jaribu kadiri unavyoweza kuepuka kula vitu hivyo, kwani unaweza kusababisha madhara kwako na kwa mtoto.
Epuka kunywa chai na kahawa pamoja na chakula kwasababu inasabisha kutokufyonzwa kwa virutubisho hasa maadini ya chuma, hili linaweza kusababisha ukosefu wa damu baadae.

Ni Muhimu kwa mama mjamzito kula Zaidi mbogamboga, matunda na protini, Kutumia chumvi yenye madini joto inasaidia kukua kwa mwili na ubongo wa mtoto, Kwa mfano, hizi ni aina za chakula unapaswa kula zaidi kwa sasa:
• Kula mbogamboga kwa wingi sana mfano: mchicha, mtoriro (matembele), kisambu. • Matunda pia mfano: machungwa, mapapai, embe, na ndizi. • Na pia uongeze vyakula vya protein kidogo mfano: madagaa, samaki, kuku, na mayai.
Tafadhali angalia ukurasa namba 2 katika bango kitita kwa maelezo zaidi.
Kama unavyojua, Lishe ni muhimu sana kwa Mama wajawazito. Lishe duni inaweza kuathiriri vibaya afya yako na mtoto.
Je, kuna vyakula ambavyo unaviepuka kula wakati wa ujauzito (Kwa mfano, mayai) ?
Mkumbushe mhudumu wa afya utakapoenda kituoni mara nyengine.
Kwanini hukupata vidonge vya kuzidisha wingi wa damu?

Ningependa tuzungumze kuhusu dawa za mitishamba wakati wa ujauzito na hatari zake kwa mama mjamzito na mtoto wake. Wanawake wengi wanatumia mitishamba kama mpamba wake, shajaratul Maryam, mzalia nyuma na tangawizi kuongeza uchungu, kuponya tumbo, kupunguza homa za asubuhi au hata kuongeza damu. Lakini mitishamba inapotumiwa kwa wingi bila ya ushauri wa daktari husababisha uharibikaji wa ujauzito, kuzaa mtoto mlemavu na hata vifo. Dawa za miti shamba ni hatari kwani hazijathibitishwa kitaalamu wala hazina kipimo muafaka, si vyema mjamzito kutumia kwa usalama wake na wa mtoto wake, mama anpohisi kutumia lazima amueleze daktari wake au mhudumu wa kliniki.

Ningependa kukuuliza maswali machache yanayokuhusu wewe na familia yako katika kuendesha shughuli za kijamii. Maswala haya yatawezesha kuboresha huduma za Afya katika jamii yako. Unaweza kuamua kutojibu maswali- Niambie tu kama hutapendelea kujibu swali. Tunaweza kuendelea?
Nimesoma zaidi ya sekondari ya Juu (Chuo)
Ni kipi kiwango cha cha elimu cha mwenza wako alichohitimu?
Wewe na Mume/mwenza wako pamoja na mwanafamilia mwengine kwa pamoja
Kikawaida ni Nani anafanya maamuzi kuhusu afya yako? Mtu anaekufanyie maamuzi ya msingi/mwisho
Ni ipi hali yako ya ndoa?
Je mwenza wako ana wake wengine au anaishi na wanawake wengine kwenye ndoa?
Ukiwemo na wewe, kwa jumla ni wake wangapi mwenza wako anao?
Unatumia usafiri gani kikawaida kutokea nyumbani kwenda kituo cha afya kwa huduma za kawaida/zisizo za dharura?
Kikawaida, inakuchukua muda gani kusafiri/kutembea kutoka nyumbani kwako kwenda kituo cha afya karibu yako kwa ajili ya huduma za kawaida/huduma zisizo za dharura?
Je uko tayari kuweka wazi hali yako ya maambukizi?
Naelewa, Kama ungependa tunaweza kulijadili hili zaidi katika tembeleo langu jengine.
Mkumbushe Mteja kuhusu ngono salama , na hakikisha yeye na mwenza wake wanapima na kujua hali zao, ili kujilinda wenyewe na mtoto wao aliyeko tumboni mwa mama.
Jadili kuhusu umuhimu wa kujua hali yake ya maambukizi ili aweze kujikinga na mtoto wake na njia pekee ya kulitimiza hili ni kuhakikisha anakwenda kituo cha afya kupima hali yake ya maambukizi.
Je uliwahi kupimwa VVU kipindi cha ujauzito wako?

Unavyotembela kituo cha afya kuna baadhi ya wamama wanaitwa mama mwambata ambao wanaweza kukusaidia/kukuongoza jinsi gani unapaswa kujitunza wakati wa ujauzito na baada ya kujifungua ili kuhakikisha unajifungua salama na kutomuambukiza mtoto virusi vya ukimwi. Tafadhali waombe wauguzi wakuunganishe na wakupe taarifa za kutosha kuhusu hili. Hawa ni mama waliyo na virusi vya ukimwi ambawo wamefuatilia na kukamilisha huduma ya kuzuia maambukizi kutoka kwa mama kwenda kwa mtoto na kujifungua mtoto ambaye hajaambukizwa virusi vya ukimwi, watakusaidia katika kipindi hiki ili na wewe ujifungue mtoto aliesalimika na virusi vya ukimwi.
Je unafata matibabu ya kufubaza virusi vya ukimwi?
Muhamasishe mteja kufata huduma za ukimwi katika klinik iliyopo karibu na yeye .
Huduma za vipimo na ushauri wa kumkinga mtoto na maambukizi ya mama

Sehemu ya kazi yangu kama muhudumu wa afya ya jamii ni kuwasaidia akina mama wajawazito kama wewe na kuhakikisaha mtoto wako anakuwa na afya bora katika kipindi hiki. Nitakuwa nakutembelea kipindi chote cha ujauzito wako na baaada ya kujifungua. Je umeridhika kukupatia huduma hizi za mama mjawazito?
Vizuri, tunaweza kuanza na tembeleo la kwanza la mama mjamzito.

Sawa, nimekuelewa kuwa kwa sasa huhitaji kupata huduma kutoka kwangu. Ni muhimu kuhakikisha unapata uangalifu wa karibu kipindi cha ujauzito kwa hivyo nitakuja tena kutizama kama itakuwa unahitaji kuhudumiwa.
Ridhaa kwajili ya huduma za ujauzito
Je unahisi mtoto anacheza angalau kila baada ya masaa sita kila siku?

Sasa upo kwenye hatua ya kulinganisha kiganja chako na cha mteja wako. Kabla ya kufanya hivyo, tafadhali hakikisha umekaa umbali wa mita mbili na mteja wako ili kujilinda na uwezekano wa kusambaza maambukizi ya Korona. Tafadhali mwambie mteja akuoneshe kiganja chake.
Nakupa rufaa uende kituo cha afya kwasababu nimekugundua una dalili za hatari.
Huna dalili yoyote ya hatari lakini ikitokea ukapatwa na moja ya dalili tulizozijadili unapaswa kwenda kituo cha afya.
Linganisha kiganja chako na cha mteja. Ikiwa kiganja cha mteja kimepauka sana kuliko chako hili ni tatizo. Iniashiria upungufu wa damu.
Uchungu wa mapema kabla ya miezi tisa
kutoa uchafu wenye harufu mbaya sehemu za siri
Kichwa kuuma sana sehemu ya mbele
Dalili za malaria(kuhisi baridi,homa na kutapika)
Huwezi kuchaguwa "Hakuna moja wapo" na chaguo jengine
Endelea na maswali yafuatayo. Angalia kama mteja ana moja kati ya matatizo haya yafuatayo yanayohusu ujauzito:
Nakupa rufaa uende kituo cha afya kwasababu nimekugundua una dalili za hatari.
Umepoteza watoto wangapi katika ujauzito zaidi ya miezi 6?
Kutokwa na damu nyingi kabla ya kujifungua
Kuchanika njia ya uzazi(karibia ya njia ya choo kikubwa)?
Kutokwa damu nyingi baada ya kujifungua
Uchungu wa muda mrefu( Zaidi ya masaa 12)
Huwezi kuchaguwa "Hakuna moja wapo" na chaguo jengine
Je umeshawahi kuwa na haya yafuatayo wakati ukijifungua katika mimba zilizopita?
Je hii ni mara yako ya kwanza kuwa mjamzito?
Idadi ya watoto waliyokuwa hai iwe baina ya 0 na
Watoto wangapi kati ya uliojifungua ambao bado wapo hai?
Je, unatumia dawa za mitishamba wakati wa ujauzito wako?

Ningependa tuzungumze kuhusu dawa za mitishamba wakati wa ujauzito na hatari zake kwa mama mjamzito na mtoto wake. Wanawake wengi wanatumia mitishamba kama mpamba wake, shajaratul Maryam, mzalia nyuma na tangawizi kuongeza uchungu, kuponya tumbo, kupunguza homa za asubuhi au hata kuongeza damu. Lakini mitishamba inapotumiwa kwa wingi bila ya ushauri wa daktari husababisha uharibikaji wa ujauzito, kuzaa mtoto mlemavu na hata vifo. Dawa za miti shamba ni hatari kwani hazijathibitishwa kitaalamu wala hazina kipimo muafaka, si vyema mjamzito kutumia kwa usalama wake na wa mtoto wake, mama anpohisi kutumia lazima amueleze daktari wake au mhudumu wa kliniki.
Je ulishawahi kujifungua kwa kusaidiwa kuvutwa na mashine?
Idadi ya kujifungua iwe ni ndogo au sawa sawa na idadi ya ujauzito.
Ni mimba ngapi kati ya hizo ziliharibika/kutolewa?
Hakikisha umeingiza nambari kati ya 1 na 20.
Ni mara ngapi umekuwa mjamzito kabla ya ujauzito huu?
Je, ushawahi kupoteza watoto katika ujauzito zaidi ya miezi 6?
Nakushauri upumzike kwa wingi, ule vyakula vyenye virutubisho, usifanye kazi ngumu na pia jitahidi kutumia uzazi wa mpango.
Je, mimba yako ya mwisho ilikuwa miaka 10 iliyopita au zaidi?

Ni muhimu kwa kila mtu kujifungua kituo cha afya. Kwasababu huwezi kujua kama unaweza kupatwa na tatizo au dharura yoyote wakati wa kujifungua. Kama umepatwa na tatizo wakati wa kujifungua ni lazima ufike kituo cha afya ili kupata huduma muhimu kwa ajili yako na mtoto ili kuhakikisha usalama wako na mtoto. Kama uliwahi kupata matatizo yoyote kipindi cha nyuma katika ujauzito wako uliopita au wakati wa kujifungua. Pia ni muhimu zaidi kuenda kituo cha afya muda huu ili kuhakikisha usalama wako na mtoto.

Kuna haki saba za mwanamke/mjamzito wakati wa kujifungua, nazo ni:
• Haki ya kutodhuriwa/kunyanyaswa kisaikolojia au kimwili. • Haki ya kupewa taarifa, kukubali/kukataa na maamuzi yake ya kuwa na mwenza/msaidizi wake yaheshimiwe wakati wa kujifungua, bila kuathiri matibabu au huduma anazostahili kupata. • Haki ya kuhudumiwa kwa uaminifu na usiri. • Haki ya kuhudumiwa kwa staha na heshima. • Haki ya uhuru na usawa bila ya kubaguliwa. • Haki ya kupata huduma yenye viwango bora iwezekanavyo. • Haki ya uhuru,kujitawala, maamuzi binafsi na kutoshurutishwa.
Haki za mjamzito wakati wa kujifungua
Tafadhali ingiza kiwango kati ya shilinigi 100 na shilingi laki tatu
Ni kiasi gani ulilipa kwa huduma?
Ningependa kukuuliza maswali machache kuhusu ubora wa huduma ulizopata katika kipindi cha mwisho ulipokwenda kituo cha Afya. Tutapeleka maoni yako bila ya kukutaja jina lako.
Ni wilaya gani kituo cha afya kipo?
Ni wapi kituo cha afya kilipo?
Ndio, nimepata huduma zote katika kituo cha afya.
Ndio, nilipata baadhi ya huduma ila nilihitajika kuenda kituo chengine kwa vipimo zaidi.
Je ulipata huduma uliyoifata katika kituo cha afya ulichokwenda?
Sikua na pesa za kulipia huduma
Hakukua na vipimo kituo cha afya
Mda wa kusubiria ulikuwa mkubwa sana. Kwahivyo niliamua kurudi nyumbani
Kupima damu kwa ajili ya kucheki sukari
Je unaweza kumshauri dada yako au jamaa yako aende kwenye kituo ambacho wewe ulienda kupata huduma za kliniki ya mama wajawazito?
Usomaji wa vipimo vuya shinikizo la damu/presha
Ulienda kufata huduma gani katika kituo cha afya au duka la dawa uliloenda?
Je ulilipa kwa ajili ya kupatiwa huduma yoyote?
Tulijadili uzazi wa mpango baada ya kujifungua
Katika tembeleo lako la hivi karibuni kwenye Kliniki ya mama wajawazito ni huduma ipi ulipewa?
Ulisubiri kwa mda gani kituoni ili kupatiwa huduma?
Muulize mama au angalia kadi yake ya kilinik: Je umeambiwa kuwa katika uja uzito wako huu mtoto atakuwa mkubwa(zaidi ya kilo 4)?
Muulize mama au angalia kadi yake ya kilinik: Je umeambiwa kuwa katika uja uzito wako huu mtoto katanguliza makalio?
Kabla ya kuomba kadi la kliniki la mama mjamzito, hakikisha unanawa mikono yako vizuri kwa maji na sabuni na pia muombe mteja aoshe mikono yake kabla ya kukukabidhi wewe kadi hiyo.
Makisio ya tarehe yako ya kujifungua ni
Makisio ya tarehe ya kujifungua iwe baina ya leo na miezi 9 ilopita
Tafadhali ingiza nambari kati ya 1 na 9.
Je, ulishauriwa ujifungulie katika kituo gani?

Tafadhali jaribu kuhudhuria kliniki mara kwa mara wakati wa ujauzito wako. Pia, ni muhimu kwa kila mtu kujifungua kituo cha afya. Kwasababu huwezi kujua kama unaweza kupatwa na tatizo au dharura yoyote wakati wa kujifungua. Kama umepatwa na tatizo wakati wa kujifungua ni lazima ufike kituo cha afya ili kupata huduma muhimu kwa ajili yako na mtoto ili kuhakikisha usalama wako na mtoto. Kama uliwahi kupata matatizo yoyote kipindi cha nyuma katika ujauzito wako uliopita au wakati wa kujifungua. Pia ni muhimu zaidi kuenda kituo cha afya muda huu ili kuhakikisha usalama wako na mtoto.
Je umeshauriwa na Mhudumu wa Afya kujifungulia kituo kikubwa zaidi ya hicho unachopatia huduma kama hospitali?
Je tarehe anayotarajia kujifungua imeandikwa kwenye kadi lake?
Je unalo kadi lako la kliniki?
Tarehe ya kupata hedhi iwe baina ya leo na wiki 44 zilopita.
Ingiza tarehe yake ya mwisho alopata hedhi.
Muulize mama au angalia kadi ya klinik: Je umeambiwa kwa katika uja uzito wako mtoto atakuwa na mlalo mbaya?

Ni muhimu kwa kila mtu kujifungua kituo cha afya. Kwasababu huwezi kujua kama unaweza kupatwa na tatizo au dharura yoyote wakati wa kujifungua. Kama umepatwa na tatizo wakati wa kujifungua ni lazima ufike kituo cha afya ili kupata huduma muhimu kwa ajili yako na mtoto ili kuhakikisha usalama wako na mtoto. Kama uliwahi kupata matatizo yoyote kipindi cha nyuma katika ujauzito wako uliopita au wakati wa kujifungua. Pia ni muhimu zaidi kuenda kituo cha afya muda huu ili kuhakikisha usalama wako na mtoto.
Huwezi kuchaguwa "Hakuna moja wapo" na chaguo jengine
Je unamatatizo yoyote ya kiafya yafuatayo?
Uliza au angalia kwenye kadi ya RCH (Box C): Je unatarajia kuwa na mapacha?
Je unakumbuka mara ya mwisho kupata hedhi yako?
Nakushauri upumzike kwa wingi, ule vyakula vyenye virutubisho, usifanye kazi ngumu na pia jitahidi kutumia uzazi wa mpango.
Tizama na uliza ikiwa mama ana mtoto. Je ameshajifungua?
Katika tembeleo hili, nitakuelekeza taarifa zote unazopaswa kuzijua kuhusu huduma za mama mjamzito na kukupa rufaa ikitokea kuna dalili zozote za hatari.
Anaogopa huduma fulani inayotolewa kwa waja wazito
Sikua na pesa za kutosha kulipia usafiri, kulipa gharama za matibabu au kununua vifaa
Nilikosa ushirikiano na mwenza au sikupewa ruhusa ya kwenda
Ilikua ni mapema sana kwa ujauzito wangu
Hospitali ya wilaya ya Chake Chake
Wewe na Mume/mwenza wako pamoja na mwanafamilia mwengine kwa pamoja
Uchungu wa muda mrefu( Zaidi ya masaa 12)
Kuchanika njia ya uzazi(karibia ya njia ya choo kikubwa)?
Kutokwa na damu nyingi kabla ya kujifungua
Kutokwa damu nyingi baada ya kujifungua
Nimesoma zaidi ya sekondari ya Juu (Chuo)
Ndio, nimepata huduma zote katika kituo cha afya.
Ndio, nilipata baadhi ya huduma ila nilihitajika kuenda kituo chengine kwa vipimo zaidi.
Kupima damu kwa ajili ya kucheki sukari
Nimesoma zaidi ya sekondari ya Juu (Chuo)
Dalili za malaria(kuhisi baridi,homa na kutapika)
kutoa uchafu wenye harufu mbaya sehemu za siri
Kichwa kuuma sana sehemu ya mbele
Uchungu wa mapema kabla ya miezi tisa
Usomaji wa vipimo vuya shinikizo la damu/presha
Hakukua na vipimo kituo cha afya
Mda wa kusubiria ulikuwa mkubwa sana. Kwahivyo niliamua kurudi nyumbani
Sikua na pesa za kulipia huduma
Tulijadili uzazi wa mpango baada ya kujifungua
Maji ya juu ya ardhi (mto, dimbwi, maji ya mvua)
Maji ya bomba mbali na nyumbani
Maji ya bomba ndani ya kiwanja cha nyumbani

bind.relevant: not(selected( /pregnancy/age_below_15/below_15_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/age_above_49/above_49_confirmation ,"no")) and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits = 0 and selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_consent/consent ,"yes")

selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/previous_delivery_by_c_section ,'yes') or selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/previous_delivery_by_vacuum ,'yes') or selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/previous_stillbirth ,'yes') or selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/ten_or_more_years ,'yes') or selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/delivery_complications ,'prolonged_labor') or selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/delivery_complications ,'large_perineal_tear') or selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/delivery_complications ,'retained_placenta') or selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/delivery_complications ,'aph') or selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/delivery_complications ,'postpartum_hemorrage') or selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/delivery_complications ,'enclampsia') or selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/delivery_complications ,'big_baby')

(not(selected( /pregnancy/age_below_15/below_15_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/age_above_49/above_49_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_consent/consent ,"no")) and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits = 0) and selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/first_time_pregnant ,'no')

(not(selected( /pregnancy/age_below_15/below_15_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/age_above_49/above_49_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_consent/consent ,"no")) and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits = 0) or ( /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits >=1 and /pregnancy/visit_introduction/has_given_birth ="no" and /pregnancy/visit_introduction/viable_pregnancy ="yes" and /pregnancy/previous_rchcard_status = "false")

((selected( /pregnancy/rch_card/is_rch_card_available ,'no') or (selected( /pregnancy/rch_card/is_rch_card_available ,'yes') and selected( /pregnancy/rch_card/is_delivery_date_written ,'no'))) and selected( /pregnancy/rch_card/remember_lmp ,'no') ) and /pregnancy/hide_lmp_or_months_pregnant ="false"

selected( /pregnancy/rch_card/higher_facility_delivery ,'yes') or selected( /pregnancy/rch_card/medical_conditions ,"diabetes") or selected( /pregnancy/rch_card/medical_conditions ,"sickle_cell") or selected( /pregnancy/rch_card/medical_conditions ,"cardiac_disease")

(not(selected( /pregnancy/age_below_15/below_15_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/age_above_49/above_49_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_consent/consent ,"no")) and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits = 0) or ( /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits >=1 and /pregnancy/visit_introduction/has_given_birth ="no" and /pregnancy/visit_introduction/viable_pregnancy ="yes")

bind.calculate: if(selected( /pregnancy/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_1/danger_sign_vaginal_bleeding ,"yes") or selected( /pregnancy/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_2/danger_sign_convulsions ,"yes") or selected( /pregnancy/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_2/danger_sign_unconsciouss ,"yes") or selected( /pregnancy/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_1/danger_sign_severe_headache ,"yes") or selected( /pregnancy/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_1/danger_sign_fever ,"yes") or selected( /pregnancy/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_1/danger_sign_abdominal_pain ,"yes") or selected( /pregnancy/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_2/danger_sign_difficult_breathing ,"yes"),1,0)

bind.relevant: selected( /pregnancy/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_2/danger_sign_convulsions ,'no') and selected( /pregnancy/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_2/danger_sign_unconsciouss ,'no') and selected( /pregnancy/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_1/danger_sign_severe_headache ,'no') and selected( /pregnancy/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_1/danger_sign_fever ,'no') and selected( /pregnancy/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_1/danger_sign_abdominal_pain ,'no') and selected( /pregnancy/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_2/danger_sign_difficult_breathing ,'no') and selected( /pregnancy/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_1/danger_sign_vaginal_bleeding ,'no')

(not(selected( /pregnancy/age_below_15/below_15_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/age_above_49/above_49_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_consent/consent ,"no")) and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits = 0 and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0) or
(selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/has_given_birth ,"no") and selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/viable_pregnancy ,"yes") and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits >=1 and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0)

bind.calculate: if(selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"difficulty_breathing") or selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"fatigue") or selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"fever") or selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"tinnitus") or selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"dizziness") or selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"frontal_headache") or selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"blurred_vision") or selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"gastric_pain") or selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"swelling") or selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"early_labor") or selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"liquid_leaking") or selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"malaria_signs") or selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"foul_smelling")1,0)

bind.relevant: /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0 and /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/pregnancy_and_pallor/refer_pregnancy_complications =0 and /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/refer_pregnancy_issues =0 and selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/pregnancy_and_pallor/baby_moving ,"yes") and selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/pregnancy_and_pallor/pallor ,"no")

(not(selected( /pregnancy/age_below_15/below_15_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/age_above_49/above_49_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_consent/consent ,"no")) and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits = 0 and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0 and /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/pregnancy_and_pallor/refer_pregnancy_complications =0) or
(selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/has_given_birth ,"no") and selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/viable_pregnancy ,"yes") and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits >=1 and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0 and /pregnancy/pregnancy_issues_group/pregnancy_and_pallor/refer_pregnancy_complications =0)

(not(selected( /pregnancy/age_below_15/below_15_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/age_above_49/above_49_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_consent/consent ,"no")) and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits = 0 and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0 and /pregnancy/previous_hiv_status ="false") or
(selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/has_given_birth ,"no") and selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/viable_pregnancy ,"yes") and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0 and /pregnancy/previous_hiv_status ="false")

(not(selected( /pregnancy/age_below_15/below_15_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/age_above_49/above_49_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_consent/consent ,"no")) and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits = 0 and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0) or
(selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/has_given_birth ,"no") and selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/viable_pregnancy ,"yes") and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits >=1 and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0)

(not(selected( /pregnancy/age_below_15/below_15_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/age_above_49/above_49_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_consent/consent ,"no")) and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits = 0 and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0) or
(selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/has_given_birth ,"no") and selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/viable_pregnancy ,"yes") and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits >=1 and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0)

(not(selected( /pregnancy/age_below_15/below_15_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/age_above_49/above_49_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_consent/consent ,"no")) and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits = 0 and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0 and /pregnancy/pregnancy_months_left <= 3) or
(selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/has_given_birth ,"no") and selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/viable_pregnancy ,"yes") and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits >=1 and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0 and /pregnancy/pregnancy_months_left <= 3)

(not(selected( /pregnancy/age_below_15/below_15_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/age_above_49/above_49_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_consent/consent ,"no")) and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits = 0 and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0) or
(selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/has_given_birth ,"no") and selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/viable_pregnancy ,"yes") and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits >=1 and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0)

(not(selected( /pregnancy/age_below_15/below_15_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/age_above_49/above_49_confirmation ,"no")) and not(selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_consent/consent ,"no")) and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits = 0 and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0) or
(selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/has_given_birth ,"no") and selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/viable_pregnancy ,"yes") and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits >=1 and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0)

(selected( /pregnancy/pregnancy_consent/consent ,"yes") or (selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/has_given_birth ,"no") and selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/viable_pregnancy ,"yes"))) and /pregnancy/n_previous_anc_visits =0 and /pregnancy/anc_screening_and_counseling/num_anc_visits >= 1 and /pregnancy/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral =0

selected( /pregnancy/quality_of_survery_care/facility_district ,"north_a") or selected( /pregnancy/quality_of_survery_care/facility_district ,"north_b") or selected( /pregnancy/quality_of_survery_care/facility_district ,"central") or selected( /pregnancy/quality_of_survery_care/facility_district ,"south") or selected( /pregnancy/quality_of_survery_care/facility_district ,"west_a") or selected( /pregnancy/quality_of_survery_care/facility_district ,"west_b") or selected( /pregnancy/quality_of_survery_care/facility_district ,"urban") or selected( /pregnancy/quality_of_survery_care/facility_district ,"chakechake") or selected( /pregnancy/quality_of_survery_care/facility_district ,"micheweni") or selected( /pregnancy/quality_of_survery_care/facility_district ,"mkoani") or selected( /pregnancy/quality_of_survery_care/facility_district ,"wete")

selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/delivery_complications ,'prolonged_labor') or selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/delivery_complications ,'large_perineal_tear') or selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/delivery_complications ,'retained_placenta') or selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/delivery_complications ,'aph') or selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/delivery_complications ,'postpartum_hemorrage') or selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/delivery_complications ,'enclampsia') or selected( /pregnancy/pregnant_woman_information/delivery_complications ,'big_baby')

( /pregnancy/has_referral =0 and selected( /pregnancy/visit_introduction/viable_pregnancy ,"yes") and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits >=1 and /pregnancy/refer_flag_anc_visit_6m_or_more = 0) or ( /pregnancy/has_referral =0 and /pregnancy/n_pregnancy_visits =0 and /pregnancy/refer_flag_anc_visit_6m_or_more = 0)
